item.title: 📝 TheTsarDev/XNET (16 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: TheTsarDev

📝 Repository: TheTsarDev/XNET

📄 Descrizione: Secure communications for the original Xbox. XNET provides end-to-end encrypted text chat, voice chat, video chat, and secure file transfer on retail hardware. Built with NXDK, it uses a lightweight content-blind relay architecture and requires no accounts or centralized message storage.

📄 Descrizione: An open-source RISC-V firmware platform for ESP32-C6(8MB Flash). Implements a BIOS/Payload architecture with a custom system call interface (ABI), independent LP-Core coprocessor management, and an anti-brick A/B OTA system.

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: bios bootloader embedded esp-idf esp32-c6 firmware riscv

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-15T14:02:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-21T00:07:50Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 francoataffarel/ActRemoteLink (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: francoataffarel

📝 Repository: francoataffarel/ActRemoteLink

📄 Descrizione: ActRemoteLink is a utility suite for PS5 workflows. It enables offline local account activation and Chiaki/Remote Play. Key features include changing account IDs offline, generating Remote Play PINs via system notifications, and monitoring successful pairing using a Python sender script to orchestrate the ELF payloads.

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-19T15:58:57Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-21T18:32:00Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
